zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Howard於1340年出生在英國諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其時，她的父親John Howard31歲，母親Alice de Bois31歲。她和Sir Piers Braose至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1370年1月3日在英國巴金哈姆爾沙安 博瓦享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Howard于1340年出生在英国諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其时，她的父亲John Howard31岁，母亲Alice de Bois31岁。她和Sir Piers Braose至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1370年1月3日在英国巴金哈姆爾沙安 博瓦享年30岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Howard was born in 1340, in East Winch, Norfolk, England, her father, John Howard, was 31 and her mother, Alice de Bois, was 31. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Piers Braose. She died on 3 January 1370, in Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Abbey, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Howard est née en 1340, à East Winch, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Howard, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice de Bois, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Piers Braose. Elle est décédée le 3 janvier 1370, à Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Abbey, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Howard 1340 in East Winch, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Howard 31 und ihre Mutter Alice de Bois 31. Sie hatte mit Sir Piers Braose mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Januar 1370 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Abbey, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Howard è nata il nel 1340 nel East Winch, Norfolk, England, sua padre, John Howard, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alice de Bois, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Piers Braose. Morì il 3 gennaio 1370, nel Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Abbey, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Howardが1340年にイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ウィンチで生まれた時，父John Howardは31歳，母Alice de Boisは31歳であった。彼女はSir Piers Braoseとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1370年1月3日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャム ボイスで30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンアビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Howard(이)가 1340년 영국 노르폴크 이스트 윈치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Howard(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Bois(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Sir Piers Braose(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 1월 3일 영국 벅잉함실르 체샤 보이스에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Howard nasceu em 1340, em East Winch, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Howard, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Bois, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir Piers Braose. Ela faleceu em 3 de janeiro de 1370, em Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Abbey, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Howard родилась в 1340 г. в местности эаст винч, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Howard было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Bois, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Piers Braose. Она умерла 3 января 1370 г. в местности чешам боис, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности эбби, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Howard nació en 1340, en East Winch, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Howard, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice de Bois, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir Piers Braose. Murió el 3 de enero de 1370, en Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en Abbey, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
